emails.body: Info on CA and Enron's Commercial Presence in CA Do we have any recent presentations, position papers, memos, etc. on (1) the CA history/situation and (2) Enron's role in the market. Kind of generic, but I am putting together a presentation for potential investors in CA deals. Chris Calger 503-464-3735

emails.body: RE: Info on CA and Enron's Commercial Presence in CA Yes. Likely not 100% of what you're looking for, but likely some info that will be useful. Best, Jeff To: Dasovich, Jeff; Kaufman, Paul
